name: vllm-osoi5-pck04-v1
description: osoi5-v0-baked (shared int4 g128 body + UNTIED int4 PRUNED lm_head, K=16384) + TRITON_ATTN + MTP K=7 on stock vLLM 0.23.0. pck04 sitecustomize patch (replicated from firfir-cast's shared serve_patch_pck04.py): rebuilds Gemma4ForCausalLM.lm_head with org_num_embeddings=K so the 16384-row pruned head loads, then compute_logits scatters the [M,K] logits into a full [M,262144] -inf buffer at keep_ids. Fixes the v1 zero-pad bug (ppl 4.3M) that misplaced kept logits. Target: ~263 tok/s VALID (ppl ~2.3).
